category.name: product_bug
category.examples: Assertion failures, unexpected behavior, wrong values

category.name: automation_issue
category.examples: Locator failures, stale elements, click intercepted

category.name: environment_issue
category.examples: Timeouts, network errors, ECONNREFUSED, DNS failures

category.name: flaky
category.examples: Passed on retry, timing issues, race conditions

context.heuristics_approach: Uses regex pattern matching against error messages and stack traces. Provides confidence scores (40-100%) based on pattern specificity. Falls back to "product_bug" with low confidence if no patterns match.

objective.goal: Show category distribution in pie chart

success_criteria.criterion: Flaky tests marked when retry_count > 0 + passed

testing_checklist.test: Flaky tests marked when retry_count > 0 + passed
